name: German Sweet Chocolate Cream Cheese Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and margarine in a 2-quart saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly until melted. Remove from heat.
- Alternatively, microwave chocolate and margarine in a large bowl at high power for 2 minutes or until margarine is melted. Stir until chocolate is completely melted.
2. Stir sugar into the melted chocolate mixture.
3. Stir in eggs and vanilla until well combined.
4. Mix in flour until well blended.
5. Stir in chopped nuts.
6. Spread the batter evenly in a greased 8-inch square pan.
7. For the cream cheese topping, mix cream cheese, sugar, egg, and flour until smooth.
8. Spoon the cream cheese mixture over the brownie layer; swirl with a knife to marbleize.
9. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean (do not overbake). Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into squares.
